hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: SymbolExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ModelBindingCommandHandler.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Simple communication system between local files and a given metabase server

options.name: server
options.description: The url used on server calls

options.name: username
options.description: The username used on server calls

options.name: password
options.description: The password used on server calls

options.name: verbose
options.description: Defines the verbosity of the logger

commands.name: auth
commands.description: Gets a X-Metabase-Session token for requests to the server.

commands.name: pull
commands.description: Pulls dashboards, cards, collections, pulses and collections from the server into the specified directory using the server collection structure

options.name: include-personal
options.description: Include personal collections on the pull, this option is ignored when the custom root collection option is used

options.name: include-archived
options.description: Include archived collections on the pull

options.name: custom-root
options.description: Defines a custom server id as root collection for the pull

options.name: exclude-pattern
options.description: Exclude all entities path/name matching this regex pattern

arguments.name: local-path
arguments.description: Target path to clone server structure [default: <path>]

commands.name: push
commands.description: Pushes dashboards, cards, collections, pulses and collections from specified directory into the server

options.name: include-personal
options.description: Include personal collections on the pull, this option is ignored when the custom root collection option is used

options.name: include-archived
options.description: Include archived collections on the pull

options.name: custom-root
options.description: Defines a custom server id as root collection for the pull

options.name: exclude-pattern
options.description: Exclude all entities path/name matching this regex pattern

arguments.name: local-path
arguments.description: Target path to clone server structure [default: <path>]

commands.name: dashboard
commands.description: Base command for dashboard operations

commands.name: get
commands.description: Get a dashboard from the server when id is given, or all if id is not given

commands.name: create
commands.description: Creates a dashboard

options.name: string-content
options.description: A string that has the json content of the dashboard

options.name: file-content
options.description: A file that has the json content of the dashboard

commands.name: update
commands.description: Updates the dashboard with the given id

options.name: string-content
options.description: A string that has the json content of the dashboard

arguments.name: file-content
arguments.description: A file that has the json content of the dashboard

commands.name: delete
commands.description: Deletes the dashboard with the given id if not already deleted

commands.name: archive
commands.description: Archives the dashboard with the given id if not already archived

commands.name: create

options.description: A string that has the json content of the card

options.name: file-content

options.description: A string that has the json content of the card

arguments.name: file-content

commands.name: delete

commands.name: archive
commands.description: Archives the card with the given id if not already archived

options.name: file-content
